Product Description:

Important Reminder!!! 1) Attention: All products in our store do not support Canada self pickup ordering. Please do not create shipping labels for Canada. Our American products do not support self pickup to Canada 2)We do not ship to Alaska, Hawaii, US protectorates (e.g., Puerto Rico), P.O. boxes, or APO/FPO addresse 3)We don’t accept non-defective remorse returns Versatile Storage Solution - This compact table with drawer helps organize books, drinks, and essentials while serving multiple purposes. Use it as a sofa-side table, coffee stand, or storage unit in living rooms, dorms, or any small space. Durable Construction - Built with sturdy MDF and a reinforced base, this drawer chest offers reliable strength for long-term use. Includes anti-toppling safety features and non-slip pads to protect floors and prevent accidents. Elegant Curved Handle Design - Features a smoothly curved handle that combines style with functionality. The ergonomic shape provides comfortable grip and smooth drawer operation for daily use. Multi-Purpose Furniture Piece - With its clean, modern design, this versatile dresser works in any room. Perfect as a bedroom nightstand, living room side table, or storage solution for entryways, offices, playrooms, and hallways. Easy Assembly & Thoughtful Design - Measures 21.6" L x 17.71" D x 25.6" H and weighs 34.3 lbs. Includes clear step-by-step instructions with labeled parts for quick, frustration-free setup so you can start using it immediately.
